ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Continued To Oct-07-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not reported. (D501)

Appearances:
No appearance by plaintiff(s)
Adrian L. Canzoneri, Esq. of Reed Smith LLP (415-659-4744) is present for defendant/demurring party Bank of America

Court hears from demurring party re DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER to 1st Amended Complaint. The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's demurrer to the Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED. The demurrer is first cause of action is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to the claim of violation of Cal. Civil Code section 2923.5. Defendant did not violate Cal. Civil Code section 2923.5.

The demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the breach of Breach of Implied Covenant of Good faith and fair dealing. Plaintiff failed to state any specific actions or conduct that may have resulted in a breach of the terms of the deed of trust.

The demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the Second cause of action for Fraud. Plaintiff failed to state specific and particular instances of the fraud.

The demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the Third cause of action for Intentional Misrepresentation and Fifth cause of action for Violation of Cal. Civil Code section 1572. Plaintiff failed to allege sufficient facts.

The demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the Fourth Cause of Action for Quiet Title. Plaintiff failed to allege the ability to tender the amount of unpaid debt.

Finally, as to the Declaratory Relief Cause of Action, the demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. This cause of action cannot stand independently of the others, as to which the Court has sustained this demurrer.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Continued To Aug-12-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
